name: coderail
description: Blueprint Gate, North-Star, Coordinate Contract Draft, Done Gate, Auto Commit Gate, CI Gate, Inspect, and traceable governance for AI coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Draft before coding. Verify before done. Close out before stopping.
interface.longDescription: CodeRail is a repo-local governance rail for AI coding agents. It adds a North-Star Kernel, Architecture Blueprint Layer, Coordinate Contract Draft, CodeRail Coordinate (Goal/Task/Scope/Verify/Stop/Persist), task contracts, execution batches, verification-before-complete, automatic task-scoped commits, CI Gate, runtime state inspect, handoff discipline, asset boundaries, and a lightweight trace graph without turning your repo into a workflow engine.
defaultPrompt: Use CodeRail to draft a coordinate contract before coding.
Use CodeRail to inspect state, run the done gate, auto-commit safe task-scoped work, and close out before stopping.
